_note: Full-world island catalog. Ingested from onepieceworldmap.com data.js (coords [y,x], swapped from GeoJSON [x,y]). 9 East Blue entries kept verbatim from east_blue_islands.json (rich PT-BR); the rest ingested minimal (1-line PT-BR summary; real lore loads at runtime on arrival). marker_kind: place=navigable, poneglyph/entity/meta=map-only. Attribution: tiles+positions Library of Ohara, map data (C)Eiichiro Oda; personal/web-local use.

islands.name: Foosha Village
islands.canon_arc_name: Romance Dawn — Luffy's childhood and Shanks's departure at Foosha

current_state.summary_text: Quiet; independent village on the edge of the Goa Kingdom.

islands.description: Pastoral village on the edge of the Goa Kingdom: 17 windmills on the horizon, cattle pastures, dirt roads between fields. Has a small port where passing ships anchor.

islands.name: Goa Kingdom
islands.canon_arc_name: Gray Terminal Fire (Sabo's flashback) — massacre of the discarded by the nobles

current_state.summary_text: Monarchy allied with the World Government; latent caste tension.

islands.description: Monarchy on Dawn Island with extreme social hierarchy: nobles in the walled High Town, commoners in Central/Edge Town, and the Gray Terminal where those discarded by the kingdom live.

islands.name: 153rd Marine Branch
islands.canon_arc_name: Romance Dawn — fall of Captain Morgan in Shells Town (Morgan escaped custody, remains a fugitive)

current_state.summary_text: Marine base in Shells Town; current command upright.

islands.description: Marine base in Shells Town. For years under the tyrannical Captain Morgan, until his removal. Today it serves the population with integrity.

islands.name: Orange Town
islands.canon_arc_name: Orange Town — occupation by Buggy the Clown (now one of the Emperors, via Cross Guild)

current_state.summary_text: Coastal town; history of pirate harassment.

islands.description: Small town in the Organ Archipelago, founded by refugees from a village destroyed by pirates. Has withstood multiple attacks over the decades.

islands.name: Syrup Village
islands.canon_arc_name: Syrup Village — Captain Kuro's conspiracy against Kaya (Usopp's hometown)

current_state.summary_text: Quiet village atop cliffs; affiliated with the World Government.

islands.description: Quiet village in the Gecko Archipelago, built atop steep cliffs. Famous for Kaya's mansion. Hometown of Yasopp and Usopp.

islands.name: Arlong Park
islands.canon_arc_name: Arlong Arc — Arlong Park, base of the fish-men dissidents of the Sun Pirates (Arlong imprisoned; supremacist ideology survives)

current_state.summary_text: Arlong Pirates' base destroyed; structure in ruins.

islands.description: Base of the Arlong Pirates, a splinter group of the Sun Pirates. The tower was a five-story pagoda; it was destroyed upon Arlong's defeat.

islands.name: Cocoyasi Village
islands.canon_arc_name: Arlong Arc — liberation of Cocoyasi (Nami's hometown, of the Straw Hat Pirates)
islands.description: Small port village in the Conomi Archipelago. Oppressed by Arlong for years until it was liberated. Surrounded by a tangerine grove.

islands.name: Gosa Town
islands.canon_arc_name: Arlong Arc — Gosa razed for refusing tribute to Arlong and rebuilt after his fall
islands.description: Port town east of Cocoyasi, destroyed when its citizens refused to pay tribute to Arlong and rebuilt after his fall.

islands.name: 16th Marine Branch
islands.canon_arc_name: Arlong Arc — 16th Branch of the corrupt Captain Nezumi (bribed by Arlong; never punished)
islands.description: Marine base near the Conomi Archipelago. Commanded by the corrupt Captain Nezumi, who themed the base with a rat appearance.
